description: Analyze NYC collision data in /home/ga/Documents/nyc_collisions.xlsx by creating an hourly summary. In the 'Crashes' sheet, extract the hour from the 'CRASH TIME' column into a new column titled 'Hour'. Create a new sheet named 'Hourly_Analysis' containing a summary table for each hour of the day (0-23) with the following headers: 'Hour_of_Day', 'Total_Crashes', 'Pedestrian_Injuries', 'Cyclist_Injuries', and 'Ped_Injury_Rate'. Calculate 'Pedestrian_Injuries' using the 'NUMBER OF PEDESTRIANS INJURED' column and 'Cyclist_Injuries' using the 'NUMBER OF CYCLIST INJURED' column. The 'Ped_Injury_Rate' should be the ratio of pedestrian injuries to total crashes, formatted as a percentage. Apply color scale conditional formatting to the 'Total_Crashes' values and insert a trend chart showing 'Total_Crashes' by 'Hour_of_Day'. Save the workbook to /home/ga/Documents/nyc_collisions.xlsx.

metadata.data_source: Realistic synthetic NYC Open Data Motor Vehicle Collisions
